industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Longyan Zhuoyue New Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Longyan Zhuoyue New Energy Co., Ltd., a renewable energy company, produces biodiesel in Europe, East Asia, and North America. It also offers oleic acid methyl ester, C16C18 fatty acid methyl ester, coconut oil methyl ester, and glycerin. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Longyan, China. Longyan Zhuoyue New Energy Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of China Biodiesel International Holdings Co. Ltd.
